title: Acense Sundae Ice Cream Footed Bowl Set, Lightweight Unbreakable Dinnerware, Food Grade Stainless Steel Tableware Serving Pieces, Long Lasting Finish, Pack of 6, 5 Oz Capacity
features: Voguish look: Enjoy your desserts in this sumptuous and amazingly finished bowl set.
Made from Stainless steel Premium grade material: These footed sundae ice cream bowls are made from superior quality food grade stainless steel that makes them durable, allowing prolonged usage

Dishwasher Safe: Cleaning these is super easy once you are done enjoying your ice cream or having your desserts. All you need to do is put them in your dishwasher, wash them with mild liquid soap and dry them with a clean cloth.

Easy to store: In case these ice cream serving bowls are not in use, just stack the cup on top of another. Doing so will help conserve room in the cabinet, making organizing the remaining cooking equipment easy.
Footed bowls: All these sundae bowls are footed, which lets you hold and keep them easily, preventing accidental slips.
description: Product Description Enjoy your desserts in this sumptuous and amazingly finished bowl set. Lightweight and Durable These footed sundae ice cream bowls are made from superior quality food grade stainless steel that makes them durable, allowing prolonged usage Presentation Stylish Ice cream glasses are perfect for impressing your guests for any occasion , for added elegance and making a lasting impression Sundae ice cream Bowls
